cart.title: Kete
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Tāpiria he wāhitau utu ki te haere tonu i tō hoko.
cart.howToPay: Me pēhea tāu e hiahia ana ki te utu?
cart.addCardPrompt: Ki te tāpiri i tētahi kāri nama, pāwhiria te pātene Tāpiri Kāri Hou.
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: Kāore he pire kīhai i utua i kitea.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Mahia te utu mō te whakamana ratonga. Ka whiwhi i te utu, ka whakamana tōtika tō ratonga.
cart.bankPaymentNote: I muri i te utu, whakatuwhera i tētahi tikiti tautoko me te ID tāuiui, rā, me te rahinga i utua. Ka whakairinga ā-ringa e mātou i te utu.

creditCard.name: Ingoa
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Me whakamana i mua i tō kāri nama e taea ai te whakamahi. Ka utu InterServer i tō kāri nama i ngā rahinga rua i raro i te $1.00 ia.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Ka puta ēnei utu i tō tauākī utu i roto i ētahi meneti, i raro auau i ngā tāuiui e tatari ana. Ki te kore e kite koe i ēnei utu, whakapā atu ki tō kaimono kāri nama mō ngā taipitopito.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Ko ēnei utu whakamana mō te whakamana anake ā ka whakakore i roto i ngā rā 3-5, e ai ki tō pēke.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: E whakaae ana ahau ki ngā utu tūāhu rua i raro i te $1.00 ia.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Takiuru ki tō pēke ipurangi kāri nama, i te waea rānei ki tō pēke ki te whakamana i ngā rahinga rua i utua. Ka puta auau ērā i raro i Ngā Utu Tatari i tō pēke. Ka ngaro ēnei utu whakamana i roto i tata 3-5 rā e ai ki tō pēke.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Tāuruhia ngā rahinga rua i utua ki tō kāri nama. Me noho ngā uara ki te USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Kia mōhio ko ngā utu i tō tauākī kāri nama tērā pea he moni ke atu i tērā e hiahiatia ana i te whārangi whakaū whakamutunga i whakaahuatia i runga. Ki te kore tō tauākī kāri nama e whakaatu i ngā rahinga tāuiui tuatahi i te moni e hiahiatia ana, ka hiahia koe ki te whakapā ki tō kamupene kāri nama. Ka taea e rātou te kī ki a koe ngā rahinga o ngā utu rua i te moni tuatahi.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tango i tō kāri nama {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Kua whakamana tēnei kāri ā kua whakamana ki te whakamahi i tō mātou pūnaha.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: Whakamana i te kāri nama i mua
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Pāwhiria konei ki te whakamana i tēnei kāri nama ki te whakamahi.

pay.title: Utu Ngā Pire
pay.creatingPaymentRequest: E waihanga ana i te Tono Utu...
pay.returnedFromPayment: I hoki mai i te utu.

paymentSuccess.title: Angitu Utu
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Tēnā koe mō tō utu. Kua oti pai tō tāuiui.

paymentTypes.title: Ngā Momo Utu
paymentTypes.ccNote: Me whakamana ngā kāri nama katoa i mua i tō rātou whakamahi. Ki te whakamana, pāwhiria te pātene "Whakamana".
paymentTypes.selectPreferredMethod: Kōwhiria Tikanga Utu Pai Rawa Atu
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te muku i tō pire {id}?

prepays.title: Moni Utu Ā-mua
prepays.showingPage: E whakaatu ana i te whārangi {page} o {totalPages} me {records} rekoata o te {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Aunoa whakamahi i ngā pire hou
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te muku i tō utu ā-mua #{id} me tōna hītori e hono ana?
